title: Orthopogon remotus
intro: Orthopogon remotus, also known as Kaffir lime, is a type of flowering plant in the citrus family, native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve nausea. The bioactive constituents of Orthopogon remotus include limonene, citral, and other volatile oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, although it's worth noting that more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
